name: Patient 48
history: In relationship with Ivan for seven years, married for three. Stressful periods during academic finals and wedding preparation due to Ivan's lack of support. Current financial pressure with Ivan's part-time work, therapy, and dental costs.
intermediate_belief: I carry all the responsibility in this relationship while Ivan contributes minimally.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm trapped in a one-sided marriage with all the burdens.
coping_strategies: Managing finances alone, handling administrative tasks solo.
situation: Partner neglects responsibilities like contributing to expenses and completing administrative tasks.
auto_thought: Once again, I have to handle everything because Ivan won't step up.
behavior: Handle expenses and administrative tasks alone due to partner's neglect.
